case_title: JERMINE GENOCHIO ET AL VS. OVERLAND, PACIFIC, & CUTLER, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL. REQUEST FOR CERTIFIED MAIL FORMS. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - FORWARD TIME EXP)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAY-22-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY GENOCHIO, JERMINE JONES JR., JACOBY AS TO DEFENDANT OVERLAND, PACIFIC, & CUTLER, INC. CHIPMAN CORPORATION DBA CHIPMAN RELOCATIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO SEP-07-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-12-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-10-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION RESET OF TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENOCHIO, JERMINE JONES JR., JACOBY
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-18-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO MAR-10-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAY-22-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JUL-20-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JERMINE GENOCHIO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JACOBY JONES JR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT OVERLAND, PACIFIC, & CUTLER, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHIPMAN CORPORATION DBA CHIPMAN RELOCATIONS IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF INFORMS SHE HAS PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT OVERLAND, PACIFIC, & CUTLER, INC, THAT HAS NOT BEEN FILED, THE PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATES SERVICE WAS DONE TO ADDRESS AT "1040 MARINA VILLAGE PKWY STE 100, ALAMEDA CA, 94501" WHICH IS NOT PROPER ADDRESS FOR AGENT FOR SERVICE AS LISTED ON THE SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE AND THEY SERVED THE COMPANY INSTEAD OF THE AGENT FOR SERVICE. ADVISED PLAINTIFF THAT IS NOT A PROPER SERVICE BUT SHE MAY STILL FILE THE PROOF OF SERVICE AT SMALL CLAIMS WINDOW IN RM103. PLAINTIFF ADVISED TO PROPERLY RESERVE THE DEFENDANTS. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY PLAINTIFF. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$140.)PROOF OF SERVICE FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST SERVED APR-18-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OVERLAND, PACIFIC, & CUTLER, INC.
